name: Bacon, Cheese, and Tomato Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon on a microwave-safe rack in a glass dish.
2. Cover loosely and microwave until crisp, 2 to 3 and a half minutes.
3. Spread toast with mayonnaise or salad dressing; sprinkle with dill.
4. Place toast slices on serving plate; top with tomato and cheese slices.
5. Crumble bacon and sprinkle over the top.
6. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until cheese begins to melt, 1 to 1 and a half minutes.
